name: BRELOK -ねずみたちの脱出-
short_description: “BRELOK - The Mice’s Escape -” is a cooperative escape game exclusively for two players. Play together with your family, friends, or your significant other.
detailed_description:
When you wake up, you find yourself in an unfamiliar room.
There is a telephone in front of you.
An unfamiliar voice comes from the telephone.
Look around and tell the other person what you notice.

*What kind of game is it?
Players choose different characters.
The characters seem to be in different rooms, and in order to escape, they need to share information that only the other person can see.
Work together to solve the mystery.

【Overview】

“BRELOK - The Mice's Escape” is
a cooperative mystery-solving escape game for two players.

Both players must own the game and communicate with each other using a communication tool such as Discord.

Number of players
2

Playing time
30 minutes to 1 hour

*Our circle creates games with time settings that are easy to play in live videos and streams.

【Important Notes】

Streaming gameplay videos is welcome for both individuals and companies.
However, please ensure you review the following guidelines.

• Please include the store page URL in the description or other areas accessible to viewers.
• We permit monetization through features provided by video platforms (ad revenue, donations, etc.).
• Streaming or broadcasting content that includes defamation or violates public order and morality is prohibited.
• “Hiroten” shall not be held liable for any damages or issues arising from streaming or broadcasting the game.
• Use the hashtag “#BRELOK” on Twitter (X). Fan art and derivative works are also welcome.
• This agreement may be modified without notice, and any videos created after such modifications will be subject to the revised terms.

【Production】

Hirometen

【Credits】

Director: Hiroyu (@hiroyuuuu)
Illustration: Tenmiyakiyo (@tenmiyakiyo)
Editing: Memeko (@memekosanma)
Music: Suzuki Puyo (@SuzukiPuyo)
Programming: RainyDoll (@RainyDollGames)
